message:
feat: add Export tab with HTML/Markdown export keybindings

Add new Export tab to the detail modal with full HTML and Markdown
export functionality. New methods for export state management,
markdown filename derivation, and export line building, wired into
the existing html_export module.

New keybindings:
- Ctrl+E: Export HTML
- Ctrl+Shift+E: Export Markdown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
